---
# Shared MCP tool definitions for SDK PR Review pipeline.
# This is a shared component (no 'on:' field) — import it into your workflow.
mcp-scripts:
  get-pr-diff:
    description: "Get unified diff between PR source and target commits with 10 lines of context"
    inputs:
      pr_number: { type: number, required: true }
    run: |
      PR_DATA=$(gh api repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/pulls/$INPUT_PR_NUMBER \
        --jq '.base.sha + " " + .head.sha')
      BASE=$(echo "$PR_DATA" | cut -d' ' -f1)
      HEAD=$(echo "$PR_DATA" | cut -d' ' -f2)
      git fetch origin "$BASE" "$HEAD" 2>/dev/null || true
      MERGE_BASE=$(git merge-base "$BASE" "$HEAD")
      git diff -U10 "$MERGE_BASE" "$HEAD"

  get-pr-metadata:
    description: "Get PR title, description, author, branches, and changed file list"
    inputs:
      pr_number: { type: number, required: true }
    run: |
      gh api repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/pulls/$INPUT_PR_NUMBER \
        --jq '{number, title, body, user: .user.login, head_ref: .head.ref, base_ref: .base.ref, head_sha: .head.sha, base_sha: .base.sha}'
      echo "--- changed files ---"
      gh api repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/pulls/$INPUT_PR_NUMBER/files \
        --paginate --jq '.[] | "\(.status)\t\(.filename)"'

  get-pr-comments:
    description: "Get existing review comments and discussion on a PR"
    inputs:
      pr_number: { type: number, required: true }
    run: |
      echo "=== Issue Comments ==="
      gh api repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/issues/$INPUT_PR_NUMBER/comments \
        --paginate --jq '.[] | "[\(.user.login)] \(.body)"' 2>/dev/null || echo "(none)"
      echo ""
      echo "=== Review Comments ==="
      gh api repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/pulls/$INPUT_PR_NUMBER/comments \
        --paginate --jq '.[] | "[\(.user.login)] \(.path):\(.line // .original_line) — \(.body)"' 2>/dev/null || echo "(none)"

  git-log:
    description: "Search git history for a file or directory. Returns commit hashes, dates, authors, and messages."
    inputs:
      path: { type: string, required: true }
      since_days: { type: number, default: 90 }
      max_count: { type: number, default: 30 }
      grep: { type: string }
      all_branches: { type: boolean, default: false }
    run: |
      ARGS="--format=%H|%ad|%an|%s --date=short"
      ARGS="$ARGS --since=${INPUT_SINCE_DAYS:-90}.days.ago"
      ARGS="$ARGS -n ${INPUT_MAX_COUNT:-30}"
      if [ -n "$INPUT_GREP" ]; then ARGS="$ARGS --grep=$INPUT_GREP"; fi
      if [ "$INPUT_ALL_BRANCHES" = "true" ]; then ARGS="$ARGS --all"; fi
      git log $ARGS -- "$INPUT_PATH"

  git-show-stat:
    description: "Show changed files and metadata for a specific commit hash"
    inputs:
      commit: { type: string, required: true }
    run: |
      git show --stat --format="%H%n%ad%n%an%n%s" "$INPUT_COMMIT"

  file-line-count:
    description: "Count lines in a file"
    inputs:
      path: { type: string, required: true }
    run: |
      if [ -f "$INPUT_PATH" ]; then
        wc -l < "$INPUT_PATH" | tr -d ' '
        echo " lines in $INPUT_PATH"
      else
        echo "ERROR: file not found: $INPUT_PATH"
      fi
---

  post-review-comment:
    description: "Post a review comment on the PR. Supports both general and inline comments."
    inputs:
      pr_number: { type: number, required: true }
      body: { type: string, required: true }
      path: { type: string }
      line: { type: number }
      start_line: { type: number }
    run: |
      BODY_JSON=$(echo "$INPUT_BODY" | jq -Rs .)
      if [ -n "$INPUT_PATH" ]; then
        COMMENT="{\"path\":\"$INPUT_PATH\",\"body\":$BODY_JSON"
        if [ -n "$INPUT_LINE" ]; then COMMENT="$COMMENT,\"line\":$INPUT_LINE"; fi
        if [ -n "$INPUT_START_LINE" ]; then COMMENT="$COMMENT,\"start_line\":$INPUT_START_LINE"; fi
        COMMENT="$COMMENT}"
        echo "{\"event\":\"COMMENT\",\"body\":\"\",\"comments\":[$COMMENT]}" | \
          gh api repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/pulls/$INPUT_PR_NUMBER/reviews --input -
      else
        echo "{\"body\":$BODY_JSON}" | \
          gh api repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/issues/$INPUT_PR_NUMBER/comments --input -
      fi
